name: cliany-site
tagline: Turn any web workflow into a callable CLI command via Chrome CDP and LLM
description: cliany-site converts browser workflows into executable CLI commands. It connects to Chrome via CDP, captures page accessibility trees, uses LLM to plan actions, and generates Python/Click adapters. This skill enables AI agents to drive the full automation cycle: environment check, login, workflow exploration, adapter generation, and command replay.
